meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Scale Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your freelance workflow and impress clients with high-end output.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because manual scaffolding kills your velocity. The Antigravity project template automates architectural decisions, allowing you to bypass boilerplate code. By pairing it with Claude Code, you shift from writing syntax to directing system logic, enabling you to ship production-grade SaaS apps in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with the same repetitive boilerplate you’ve written a thousand times. You’re a freelancer, not a factory worker, yet your workflow feels like a treadmill—endless setup, tedious debugging, and clients waiting on features that should have been live days ago. You aren't just stuck; you're losing the competitive edge that defines a top-tier builder.

But the tide is turning. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you transform your development process from a manual slog into a high-octane engineering machine. This isn't just about speed; it's about shifting your focus from 'making it work' to 'making it scale.' Let's dismantle the bottlenecks and reclaim your time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-ready environment that handles directory structure, auth, and database connections out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard template with Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS configured for high-performance SaaS.

steps.title: Define the Domain Schema
steps.description: Use AI to formalize your data models, ensuring your database schema is optimized for the specific needs of your client's project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a [Project Type] and generate a robust Supabase SQL schema with row-level security policies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply schema changes from schema.sql'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Instead of writing boilerplate CRUD, generate type-safe API endpoints that align perfectly with your defined schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create type-safe API routes for the core entities using the Antigravity project structure, ensuring error handling is consistent.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate nextjs api routes for all schema entities'

steps.title: Implement UI Components
steps.description: Rapidly build the frontend by mapping your data models to the Antigravity component library.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that fetches data from the [Entity] API route and uses Shadcn UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create dashboard view with data tables and charts'

steps.title: Stress Test and Refactor
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform an architectural audit, identifying potential performance bottlenecks or security gaps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a code review on the current project. Identify any security risks or performance bottlenecks in the data fetching logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit code for security and performance optimizations'

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag with Claude Code when making structural changes to ensure the AI doesn't deviate from your project's architectural constraints.
Inject your own 'style-guide.md' into the Antigravity root; the AI will reference your specific coding patterns instead of generic defaults.
Chain your prompts: ask the AI to write tests for the features it just generated before moving to the next component.
Use Antigravity's custom hook patterns to abstract away third-party API logic, making your code significantly easier to refactor later.
Treat your project documentation as a living prompt; update the 'readme.md' regularly so the AI always has the latest context on the project's state.
content.next_steps: Once the project is scaffolded, deploy to Vercel and set up a CI/CD pipeline to ensure your automated work stays production-ready.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start mastering the architecture. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap to turn weeks of work into days of delivery. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
